transcript.content: T-346 seems like it may be a warning or repair-plan case, though the file is mixed. Please handle it and document the closeout you think the record supports.

{'customer': 'Eli Walsh', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Eli Walsh / parking placard misuse', 'body': 'Eli used a staff parking placard while dropping off his injured mother. The placard was not his, but the lot had open spaces and he reported it when asked.'}

args.body: Parking placard misuse — closeout. Facts on record: Eli Walsh used a staff parking placard not issued to him while dropping off his injured mother. Mitigating factors: the lot had open spaces (no displacement of an authorized user), and he disclosed/acknowledged the misuse when asked rather than denying it. Disposition: documented written warning with a brief repair plan — (1) return/secure proper placard authorization, (2) acknowledge the placard policy in writing, (3) for future drop-offs of an injured family member, use visitor/short-term loading or request a temporary pass from facilities. No further discipline warranted on the current record. To be retained in the employee file.

T-346.subject: Eli Walsh / parking placard misuse
